title: Russian Molten Hash Browns
description: A crispy, golden hash brown dish infused with the richness of Russian butter and molten flavors. Perfect for a comforting breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine grated potatoes, melted Russian butter, and shredded molten cheese. Season with salt and pepper.
Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and top with pre-cooked hash browns.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
